Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To Apr-17-14 At 01:45 P.M. In Dept 503

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Adult Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on an Order Approving Compromise of Disputed Claim of Person with a Disability.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Doyel Price.
Order Granting Waiver of appearance by Pamela Price on file.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $4,248.28
Attorney's Fees: $3,860.32 payable to Law Firm of Brayton & Purcell LLP.
Reimbursement for medical an all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the amount of $1,821.71.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement $5,682.03.
A net balance of $4,248.28 to be deposited into Bank of America, 6210 Beach Blvd., Buena Prk, CA 90621, account nmber 1026423724 in the name of Pamela Price, and Doyel Price shall manage this account for Pamela's benefit with all disbursements therefore being made on her behalf.
The allocation of 10% of all net lawsuit proceeds to the wrongful death cause of action and to the claim of Pamela Price is approved and shall apply to all future settlements.
Future settlements from other defendants in this action, as may be recoommended by counsel (including bankruptcy or class claims) may be accepted by Doyel Price, action on behalf of Pamela Price, an adult person with a disability, and that 10% of the net settlements, after attorneys' fees (ranging from 25% to 40% depending upon trial date and/or bankruptcy proceeding) and 10% of costs are deducted, be distributed in the name of Pamela Price and deposited into Pamela Price's Bank of America account, number 10264223724 without the necessity of further petition being made to this Court.
If distribution of future settlement funds, as set forth above reaches $20,000 or more, funds over $20,000 shall be paid as directed by the Court pursuant to request for further instructions.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Compromise of Pending Action of Person with disability.
